channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Cavity Crushers Codes (June 2026)
item.content:encoded:
Use these Roblox Cavity Crushers monthly redeem codes to get your hands on plenty of free rewards, including  and much more.

Cavity Crushers throws players into an unexpectedly creative premise—defending the human mouth from relentless bacterial invasions using an army of sentient teeth. This Roblox tower defense experience, developed by Simple and Fiya Games, transforms dental hygiene into an engaging strategic battlefield where players must think tactically to survive increasingly aggressive waves of microscopic enemies.

The core gameplay revolves around collecting and deploying various teeth units, each with distinct defensive capabilities and attack patterns. Players earn Enamels—the game’s primary currency—by successfully repelling bacterial assaults, which can then be invested in capsules that unlock more powerful dental defenders. The strategic depth comes from positioning your tooth army effectively and continuously upgrading both your teeth and toothbrushes to handle tougher enemy waves.

Rare and secret teeth offer unique abilities that can turn the tide of battle, encouraging players to experiment with different defensive compositions. Since its release, Cavity Crushers has carved out its niche in the Roblox tower defense genre with its humorous concept and accessible gameplay loop.

Active Cavity Crushers Codes

  • 1MVISITS: 75 Pass points
  • 250k: Infected Mutated Tooth
  • Release: 500 Coins

Expired Cavity Crushers Codes

As of the writing of this article, there are no expired Cavity Crushers Codes.

How To Redeem Cavity Crushers Codes

Redeem codes in Cavity Crushers is rather simple, as it is for most Roblox games. Simply follow these steps to redeem any active Cavity Crushers codes.

  1. Boot Cavity Crushers in Roblox
  2. Look to the left side of the screen and find the Shop icon
  3. Scroll all the way to the bottom of the menu to the code entry box
  4. Type or paste an active code into the text box
  5. Click on ‘redeem’ to claim the freebie

Where To Find More Cavity Crushers Codes

Staying updated on new Cavity Crushers codes requires knowing where the developers actually communicate with their community. The game’s official Discord server is the primary hub where Simple and Fiya Games share fresh redemption codes, often bundled with announcements about new teeth units, gameplay adjustments, and upcoming features. Joining the Discord gives you direct access to the source while connecting you with fellow players who share code discoveries and strategic tips for maximizing your dental defense setup.

Social media platforms offer supplementary code drops, particularly when Cavity Crushers reaches community milestones. The developers have been known to celebrate achievements like hitting visitor thresholds or successful update launches by distributing time-sensitive codes across their social channels. These codes typically appear during special occasions, whether it’s the introduction of powerful new tooth types, seasonal events, or when the game crosses significant engagement markers.

Since these releases are unpredictable and codes can expire without advance notice, missing a 24-hour window means missing out on exclusive rewards like rare teeth or substantial currency boosts. 

That said, there’s a simpler approach than juggling multiple platforms. Save this guide in your browser and check back instead of trying to monitor every source yourself. This page is refreshed as soon as fresh codes go live, and any codes that have expired are taken out quickly so you always see only the ones that still work.

Enjoying our Roblox games codes coverage? Check out the codes for popular games like Steal A Brainrot, Radiant Residents, and Fix It Up on Insider Gaming!

Interested in the latest developments in the world of gaming and esports? Then join the Insider Gaming Discord server and engage with the passionate community.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Lucky Block Rush Codes (June 2026)
item.content:encoded:
Use these Roblox Lucky Block Rush monthly redeem codes to get your hands on plenty of free rewards, including Potions and much more.

Lucky Block Rush is an engaging Roblox experience that throws players into a luck-based combat adventure where defeating enemies and opening lucky blocks go hand in hand. Players must fight increasingly powerful foes to boost their luck stat, with each victory rewarding them with a Lucky Block containing valuable Brainrot; collectible items that generate passive income even when offline.

The core gameplay loop revolves around strategic combat and resource management. As players defeat enemies, they unlock different types of Brainrots with varying rarities, each contributing to their overall progression. The game’s appeal lies in its blend of active battling and idle mechanics, allowing players to customize their approach based on how much time they want to invest in grinding versus collecting passive rewards.

Since it’s release, Lucky Block Rush has carved out its niche in the Roblox ecosystem by combining the addictive nature of gacha-style collection with action-oriented gameplay.

Active Lucky Block Rush Codes

  • TOY: 1x Luck Potion
  • release: 1x Hacked Frulli Frula

Expired Lucky Block Rush Codes

As of the writing of this article, there are no expired Lucky Block Rush Codes.

How To Redeem Lucky Block Rush Codes

Much like most Roblox games, it is very easy to redeem codes in Lucky Block Rush. Here’s how:

  1. Boot Lucky Block Rush on Roblox
  2. Find the ‘Shop’ button on the right hand side of the screen
  3. Click on the ‘Codes’ tab from the menu options
  4. Type or paste a working code in the text box
  5. Click on verify to claim your freebie

Where To Get More Lucky Block Rush Codes

Finding new Lucky Block Rush codes requires staying plugged into where the developers actually share them, as the game itself won’t alert you when fresh codes become available. Your primary resource should be the official Discord server (xFrozen x Dudes’ discord server) this is where developers consistently post codes alongside update announcements and community discussions.

Beyond Discord, developers occasionally drop codes through their social media channels and Roblox group pages. These releases often coincide with meaningful milestones—whether that’s hitting player count targets, rolling out new content updates, or celebrating community achievements.

The unpredictable timing of these code drops means you could miss out on free Brainrots and luck potions if you’re not actively monitoring multiple sources, and codes can vanish without advance notice once they expire

That said, there’s a simpler approach. Bookmark this guide and return periodically rather than juggling multiple platforms yourself. The page is continuously updated whenever new codes surface and promptly remove any that have stopped working, ensuring gamers only see active redemptions that’ll actually give you rewards.

Enjoying our Roblox games codes coverage? Check out the codes for popular games like Steal A Brainrot, Radiant Residents, and Fix It Up on Insider Gaming!

Interested in the latest developments in the world of gaming and esports? Then join the Insider Gaming Discord server and engage with the passionate community.

item.title: kyousuke Outshines donk as Falcons Make IEM Cologne 2026 Major Grand Final
item.content:encoded:
Team Falcons defeated Team Spirit 2-1 in a hugely dramatic IEM Cologne 2026 Major Semi-Final to qualify Falcons for their first Major Grand Final as an organization.

Records set, and soon to be set in the IEM Cologne 2026 Major Grand Final

The Grand Final will be the fourth Major Grand Final in the last five Majors for veteran IGL Finn ‘karrigan’ Andersen. The Dane achieves the feat after only two months on the roster following his FaZe departure.

Falcons will now face FURIA in the Best of 5 Grand Final after FURIA defeated Aurora 13-9, 13-4 to return FalleN to the Grand Final of IEM Cologne, an event he has won in 2017 and notably 2016 when the event was last a Counter-Strike Major.

  • Related: “I saw in their eyes that everybody was ready to play today” – YEKINDAR on FURIA IEM Cologne 2026 Major Semi-Final victory

A victory at IEM Cologne would be the third Major for the storied Brazilian, and a second for karrigan if Falcons overcome FURIA’s challenge.

For every other player in the server, it would be their first Major title, most notably, it would be a first Major title for the legendary rifler who has long since chased the accolade, finishing as the runner-up at the PGL Stockholm Major in 2021.

René ‘TeSeS’ Madsen has also appeared in a Major Grand Final before, falling short against Outsiders in the IEM Rio 2022 Major Grand Final.

kyousuke shines as Falcons progress to Grand Final

The benefits of karrigan’s IGLing have been felt in many ways since joining Falcons, from more brawly rounds to more clutch factor in his players.

However, no aspect of Falcons’ progress is greater than the individual progress of Maksim ‘kyousuke’ Lukin, who has experienced a somewhat coming of age under karrigan’s leadership.

The Russian rifler outshone Danil ‘donk’ Kryshkovets over the course of the series, delivering time and time again to make the difference in the series, against his former organization no less. While kyousuke was a role clash with donk, one wonders whether Spirit regret letting their former academy player go.

Best of all for karrigan’s fans, he one negative of karrigan’s IGLing up until now has slipped away in the Lanxess, with the veteran IGL delivering a few much-needed kills to help his team over the line.

Notably, karrigan delivered on the AWP on Anubis to shut down a B-hit, and jumped through smokes and window on the B site in multiple rounds to give Falcons huge site openings and help them on their way.

Let us know your IEM Cologne 2026 Major predictions on Insider Gaming’s Discord


For other news, see the League of Legends MSI play-ins bracket and sign up to the Insider Gaming newsletter

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Capcom Created a ‘Diana Police’ Team for PRAGMATA
item.content:encoded:
During the development of PRAGMATA, Capcom had assembled a task force of sorts. Described as the “Diana Police,” the group ensured that the game’s younger main character was neither too cute nor too annoying.

As Capcom continues to have a banner 2026, one of its best-selling games so far this year is the brand-new IP PRAGMATA. The game follows the protagonist, Hugh, and his android companion, Diana. Their relationship is similar to that of a father and daughter throughout the story, and the combat is even linked to their connection.

Now, the individuals who worked on the game are speaking out about its development and the steps they took to ensure Diana wouldn’t become too annoying a character.

Game producer Naoto Oyama and director Cho Yonghee were recently interviewed by Game*Spark. During the interview, Yonghee noted that the “Diana Police” was comprised entirely of women.

“Women are more likely to notice the ‘cunning’ of female characters than men, who might wonder, ‘What’s the difference?’ I think all the staff at the Diana Police were women,” he said.

Oyama added, “During development, defining the character’s personality was a challenge. Once the game is released, there’s a shared understanding among users that the character is like this, but during development, it’s expected to change, so even if you set a core character, there will be parts that deviate. The entire team works together to correct those deviations and create the realistic character images we see today.”

  • More PRAGMATA News: Pragmata Sells Over One Million Copies in Two Days

Have you played PRAGMATA? Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server.

For more on Insider Gaming, check out the story on Capcom earning record profits recently. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: The Police’s Stewart Copeland Confirms He Isn’t Working on New Spyro
item.content:encoded:
The Police drummer Stewart Copeland has confirmed he is not composing music for the next Spyro game currently in development.

The next Spyro the Dragon game was announced during the June 2026 XBOX Showcase. While it aims to draw fans from the original trilogy, the game’s critically acclaimed composer will not be returning for the title.

New Spyro Game Will Not Feature Music by Stewart Copeland

Stewart Copeland is best known as the drummer of The Police, but after the band disbanded, he went on to compose movie scores and dipped his toe into video games with the original Spyro the Dragon trilogy. Copeland was the composer for all three of the Spyro games on the original PlayStation.

He was recently interviewed by The Independent about his career and the forthcoming documentary. During the interview, he was asked if he was returning to compose Spyro: A Realm Beyond. He confirmed he would not be returning for the 2027 game. Still, he seems to bear no ill will toward not being asked to work on the game.

“It happens that way,” he said. “It’s a new generation. They want a new generation of sound and everything… they’ve got to modernize it. No harm, no foul.”

Very little of the game was shown during the original reveal. Toys For Bob is excited for players to try out the game and hopes it’s true to the original trilogy. However, they were not ready to share too many details.

  • More Spyro News: New Spyro the Dragon Game Announced at XBOX Showcase

Do you think this game would be better off hiring Stewart Copeland? Do you have many fond memories of the Spyro the Dragon soundtracks? Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server.

For more, check out everything announced during the XBOX Showcase here. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

item.title: Kevin Conroy Featured in LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight
item.content:encoded:
Kevin Conroy is featured in LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight, celebrating the legendary actor’s Batman legacy.

LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight is a game that celebrates all eras of the “Caped Crusader” with a charm only LEGO bricks can provide. The title prides itself on its unique story, drawing on different iterations and interpretations of Batman. As such, it’s not a surprise to learn that Kevin Conroy, the voice of Batman from the animated series and in many other animated variations, makes a posthumous appearance in this game.

LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight Includes Kevin Conroy

Kevin Conroy is considered the most closely associated with Batman’s voice. Conroy began his journey voicing Batman in the animated series that premiered in 1992, and in the video game space, he first voiced the character in Batman Vengeance and most famously appeared in the Arkham trilogy of games developed by Rocksteady. It is in Arkham Asylum that Conroy’s voice can be heard in LEGO Batman. During a scene reenacting the beginning of the 2009 Arkham Asylum game, Conroy’s voice can be heard as an announcer over the asylum’s PA.

  • More LEGO Batman News: LEGO Batman Offers 100+ Suits and Other Collectibles

Tribute is also paid to Conroy with a billboard advertising a talk show called After Hours with Conroy: The Voice of Gotham. Senior Level Designer Mike Consalvey reacted on Twitter to players discovering these Easter eggs, saying he’s glad somebody finally discovered the legendary actor’s presence in the game.

How do you feel about this tribute? Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server.

For more, check out news concerning a Batman Arkham Shadows sequel being canceled. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Meccha Chameleon Surpasses 5 Million Sales
item.content:encoded:
Meccha Chameleon has achieved a significant commercial milestone, with total sales now surpassing 5 million copies worldwide.

When a game catches fire the way that Meccha Chameleon has, it can be astonishing to watch sales numbers and player counts rise. With a price tag of only $5.99 on Steam, there’s an easy entryway for curious players, and as such, the game has now reached 5 million players.

Meccha Chameleon Surpasses 5 Million Sales

The game is among the top 10 most played on Steam currently, ahead of games such as Apex Legends and Destiny 2. There are currently 186 concurrent players, and the all-time high saw over 280,000 players on the budget title.

The game was developed by a solo developer, lemorion_1224. The developer announced on Steam that a new official map and additional game options would be coming in the near future and posted a message thanking players for helping the game reach the milestone so quickly.

  • More Meccha Chameleon News: Is Meccha Chameleon On PlayStation, Xbox Or Nintendo Switch? All Platforms

Less than a week beforehand, the game celebrated 1 million copies sold on June 13. There have been numerous updates since the game launched, with the most recent a small one that fixed issues related to Steam Workshop and prevented detected players from being deleted after a certain period. As of Wednesday, June 17, a map had been added to the game, and several changes have been made to the online search function, voice chat icons, and more.

In an era where the games industry is experiencing different tumultuous decisions and cutbacks, a solo-developed game has taken the World by storm. Time will tell how long this wave of momentum lasts for Meccha Chameleon, but for now, players are enjoying the ride.

What do you think of the game so far? Have you played it? Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server.

For more on Insider Gaming, check out the titles featured in our recent showcase. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: “I saw in their eyes that everybody was ready to play today” – YEKINDAR on FURIA IEM Cologne 2026 Major Semi-Final victory
item.content:encoded:
Insider Gaming caught up with Mareks ‘YEKINDAR’ Gaļinskis after FURIA’s 13-9, 13-4 victory over Aurora in the Semi-Finals of the IEM Cologne 2026 Major.

YEKINDAR explained what a Major title would mean to him, why FURIA showed their best in the series, and who he expects to face in the Grand Final of the Major.

Insider Gaming speaks to YEKINDAR after qualification to the IEM Cologne 2026 Major Grand Final

You’re in the Grand Final. How does it feel?

It feels, of course, great. Honestly, a little bit unthinkable because coming into this tournament, there was no necessarily confidence.

For us, the season was on a lower note, you know, and of course, it’s interesting how everybody clicked at the same time, and I’m super grateful for the team, super grateful for FURIA for this opportunity.

Today felt perfect from you guys, but yesterday, especially on Dust 2, it seemed like 9z really read you really well. So what do you think you changed in this match?

Well, I think for us, quarter-finals was a little bit mental as well because there was already two Majors before where we lost in quarter-finals and expected to win.

So, it was hard to play because 9z is definitely a team with fire in their eyes, and they were choosing all the right things. It was very hard to play on Dust 2, but Mirage, somebody wanted us to win, even after KSCERATO crashing on the 5v3, yuurih won 1v4, there was a 2v5 that we won.

So there was those little details, the Major magic, I call it, those are the ones that allowed us to win that map.

So in terms of the Dust 2 today, it was more like everyone just felt like confident from the start?

Yeah, I feel like it was easier to play because, we are already past quarter-finals, and I feel like Danil [molodoy] was feeling it as well today, especially on Dust 2, it’s one of the most important things. If Danil’s feeling good, then it’s going to be a good map.

You’re going to fight for the trophy now. What would it mean to you to win a major?

Of course, I mean, I think it would be inspirational for many people out there, everybody who remembers two years ago where I was in terms of mental and result-wise and everything.

Winning a major trophy would be an example for people, and of course for me it would be nice and everything, it’s cool, it’s something you dream of, but for a bigger picture, I feel like if it can help people to see my story and to see me win, then that would be amazing.

In terms of history, do you have a memory of a major from when you were young, that inspired you to get into Counter-Strike?

I’ve watched many majors during that time, but a specific memory, no. I think back then, back then I think it was when Fnatic won in 2015, the olofmeister Tec-9. I think that’s, that’s for me the most memorable thing.

In terms of Nuke, your rotations were really on point. It’s something that’s not been great at times this year, so how was everyone contributing to that today?

All these rotations come from communication and how people feel and communication comes from how people feel. Today, I woke up, I saw in their faces, in their eyes, everybody was ready to play today and that’s why everything went so smooth.

People were adding one plus one, when somebody asks something, the other one confirms.

As silly as it sounds, those are the fundamentals of a great CT-side and that’s what we’ve been focusing on a lot.

Who do you want to play in the Grand Final?

Honestly, it doesn’t matter, but I think Spirit will win.

End of Interview

Let us know your IEM Cologne 2026 Major predictions on Insider Gaming’s Discord


For other news, see the League of Legends MSI play-ins bracket and sign up to the Insider Gaming newsletter

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Bobby Prince, Legendary DOOM Composer, Passes Away
item.content:encoded:
Bobby Prince, the composer behind DOOM‘s iconic soundtrack, has passed away at 81, leaving a lasting mark on video game music.

Prince’s family confirmed that he passed away on Tuesday, June 16, 2026. While he was best known for his work on DOOM, he also worked on the soundtracks for the Duke Nukem and Wolfenstein franchises.

His obituary was shared on Legacy and touted his innovative work in the field: “Through his compositions and sound design for landmark titles including Doom, Doom II, Wolfenstein 3D, Rise of the Triad, and Duke Nukem 3D, Bobby helped establish video game music as a respected art form. In 2005, the Video Game Industry honored him with a Lifetime Achievement Award. In 2026, the soundtrack to the original Doom was selected for preservation in the Library of Congress, ensuring that his groundbreaking work would remain part of America’s cultural heritage for generations to come.”

Tributes to DOOM Composer Bobby Prince

Following his passing, many in the industry paid tribute to Bobby Prince. Among those who came out to comment was Tom Hall, co-founder of id Software. Hall remembered Prince as a legendary musician and a fun-loving man.

“RIP Bobby Prince. His music legacy will live on, making inspired music for Commander Keen, Wolfenstein 3D, DOOM, countless others. A true legend. And such a nice man, great musician, wonderful, fun-loving man, nothing but happy memories of him. A loss to the world,” He wrote on Bluesky.

  • Related: Ubisoft Co-Founder Killed in France Plane Crash

Also, Lee Jackson, the individual who worked with Prince on Duke Nukem 3D and Rise of the Triad, posted on Bluesky to recall those moments and praise the composer as a teacher and friend.

“We worked together so well on Duke Nukem 3D that we could anticipate what the other was going to do next. If it weren’t for him, I’d probably be stuck in a tech room somewhere still. Au revoir, Bobby. You’re definitely missed,” he wrote.

Insider Gaming sends its condolences to Prince’s family, friends, and fans. What was your favorite DOOM track? Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server.

For more on Insider Gaming, check out the games leaving PlayStation next month. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP
